title: jasminum elongatum
intro: Jasminum elongatum, also known as the long-flowering jasmine or star jasmine, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia and Australia, characterized by its star-shaped white flowers and twining stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Jasminum elongatum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
